breakdown: This PR adds CodeRabbit approval fallback logic to Skeptic Gate workflows - when no formal CR review exists, it now checks both the commit status context and a '[approve]' bot comment. Variable naming improved slightly (removed 'RAW' for clearer 'PIPELINE'), and comprehensive error handling was added with explicit jq exit code checks and set +e -o pipefail guards. Good documentation explains the fallback rationale. Type safety is irrelevant for shell scripts, and code duplication exists across two workflow files.
key_changes: Added fallback logic: checks CR commit status + '[approve]' comment when no formal review found
Added error handling: set +e -o pipefail with explicit jq exit code capture and handling
Renamed LATEST_CR_RAW to LATEST_CR_PIPELINE for clarity
Added CR_APPROVE_PIPELINE and CR_APPROVE_EXIT variables with error handling
Removed regex escape '\\s*' from '[approve]' comment matching pattern
